label: ai
prompt_text: C1-2 arthrography. To describe the technique of C1-2 arthrography and recommend it as a suitable treatment for pain due to C1-2 abnormalities. One hundred patients with the following conditions were studied: cervical pain or neuralgia without radiographic changes (group 1, n = 23), osteoarthritis (group 2, n = 37), rheumatoid arthritis (group 3, n = 23), ankylosing spondylarthritis (group 4, n = 5) and diverse conditions (group 5, n = 12). The technique consists of lateral puncture of the posterior aspect of the C1-2 joint with a 20-gauge needle under fluoroscopic control, arthrography using 1 ml contrast medium, and a 1-ml long-acting steroid injection subsequently.
base_text: C1-2 arthrography. To describe the technique of C1-2 arthrography and recommend it as a suitable treatment for pain due to C1-2 abnormalities. One hundred patients with the following conditions were studied: cervical pain or neuralgia without radiographic changes (group 1, n = 23), osteoarthritis (group 2, n = 37), rheumatoid arthritis (group 3, n = 23), ankylosing spondylarthritis (group 4, n = 5) and diverse conditions (group 5, n = 12). The technique consists of lateral puncture of the posterior aspect of the C1-2 joint with a 20-gauge needle under fluoroscopic control, arthrography using 1 ml contrast medium, and a 1-ml long-acting steroid injection subsequently.
final_text: C1-2 arthrography. To describe the technique of C1-2 arthrography and recommend it as a suitable treatment for pain due to C1-2 abnormalities. One hundred patients with the following conditions were studied: cervical pain or neuralgia without radiographic changes ( group 1, n = 23 ), osteoarthritis ( group 2, n = 37 ), rheumatoid arthritis ( group 3, n = 23 ), ankylosing spondylarthritis ( group 4, n = 5 ) and diverse conditions ( group 5, n = 12 ). The technique consists of lateral puncture of the posterior aspect of the C1-2 joint with a 20-gauge needle under fluoroscopic control, arthrography using 1 ml contrast medium, and a long-acting steroid injection subsequently.

Robert Green (American football)

Robert David Green (born September 10, 1970) is a former American football running back in the National Football League (NFL)for the Washington Redskins, the Minnesota Vikings, and the Chicago Bears. He played college football at the College of William & Mary. He recorded career totals of 1,038 yards rushing on 221 carries, 596 yards receiving, and 256 yards of kick returns in six seasons.
base_text:
Robert Green (American football)

Robert David Green (born September 10, 1970) is a former American football running back in the National Football League (NFL)for the Washington Redskins, the Minnesota Vikings, and the Chicago Bears. He played college football at the College of William & Mary. He recorded career totals of 1,038 yards rushing on 221 carries, 596 yards receiving, and 256 yards of kick returns in six seasons. Green was known for his versatility as a runner and return specialist, often serving as a key component of his teams' special teams units

prompt_text: DESCRIPTION (Applicant's abstract): Long-term, persistent mental illness is typically associated with poverty and unemployment. Effectiveness research, using experimental designs, has yet to be done.

abstract: 'We investigate the dipole mode in a superfluid gas of Fermi atoms trapped in a harmonic potential. According to Kohn’s theorem, the frequency of this collective mode is not affected by an interaction between the atoms and is always equal to the trap frequency. This remarkable property, however, does not necessarily hold in an approximate theory. We explicitly prove that the Hartree-Fock-Bogoliubov generalized random phase approximation (HFB-GRPA), including a coupling between fluctuations in the density and Cooper channels, is consistent with both Kohn’s theorem as well as Goldstone’s theorem.
base_text:
---

prompt_text: “A coroner’s pronouncement of suicide (felo da se) resulted in forfeiture of the deceased’s goods and property to the state, often leaving any surviving relatives destitute. So the increasingly common verdict of temporary insanity (non compos mentis) may suggest a change in how people understood the act of self-destruction: no longer construed as a demonic temptation, it came instead to be viewed as a symptom of lunacy.” On the prevalence of suicide in eighteenth-century English literature. "Year-end lists are always subjective and incomplete, but they are especially tricky for books. A dedicated film critic can watch every wide release film and a theater critic can go to most every play, but the book critic is faced with an insurmountable mountain of books each year.

label: ai
prompt_text: Intracerebral Gene Therapy Using AAVrh.10-hARSA Recombinant Vector to Treat Patients with Early-Onset Forms of Metachromatic Leukodystrophy: Preclinical Feasibility and Safety Assessments in Nonhuman Primates. No treatment is available for early-onset forms of metachromatic leukodystrophy (MLD), a lysosomal storage disease caused by autosomal recessive defect in arylsulfatase A (ARSA) gene causing severe demyelination in central and peripheral nervous systems. We have developed a gene therapy approach, based on intracerebral administration of AAVrh.10-hARSA vector, coding for human ARSA enzyme.

abstract: 'We prove an open version of Ruan’s Crepant Transformation Conjecture for toric Calabi-Yau 3-orbifolds, which is an identification of disk invariants of $K$-equivalent semi-projective toric Calabi-Yau 3-orbifolds relative to corresponding Lagrangian suborbifolds of Aganagic-Vafa type. Our main tool is a mirror theorem of Fang-Liu-Tseng that relates these disk invariants to local coordinates on the B-model mirror curves.

abstract: 'We prove an open version of Ruan’s Crepant Transformation Conjecture for toric Calabi-Yau 3-orbifolds, which is an identification of disk invariants of $K$-equivalent semi-projective toric Calabi-Yau 3-orbifolds relative to corresponding Lagrangian suborbifolds of Aganagic-Vafa type. Our main tool is a mirror theorem of Fang-Liu-Tseng that relates these disk invariants to local coordinates on the B-model mirror curves.
final_text: -- - abstract: 'We prove an open version of Ruan ’ s Crepant Transformation Conjecture for toric Calabi-Yau 3-orbifolds, which is an identification of disk invariants of $ K $ -equivalent semi-projective toric Calabi-Yau 3-orbifolds relative to corresponding suborbifolds of Aganagic-Vafa type. Our main tool is a mirror theorem of Fang-Liu-Tseng that relates these disk invariants to local coordinates on the B-model mirror curves.

prompt_text: Perovskite structures, with the general formula, ABO~3~, form one of the most important and commercially exploited family of solids. Hybrid perovskites that contain both organic and inorganic components are a subset, where the A site is composed of an organic cation, such as methylammonium (MA), within a post transition metal halide framework, such as lead iodide. They have emerged since 2009 (ref. [@b1]) as simple, low cost solar cell materials, with power conversion efficiencies that are becoming competitive with silicon[@b2][@b3][@b4][@b5][@b6][@b7].
base_text: Perovskite structures (ABO₃) are a key family of commercially important solids. Hybrid variants, featuring organic cations like methylammonium (MA) in inorganic halide frameworks (e.g., lead iodide), emerged as low-cost solar cell materials since 2009, achieving competitive power conversion efficiencies. However, their commercialization is hindered by instability under humid, hot, or illuminated conditions, causing ion migration, phase segregation, and organic-inorganic interface degradation.
final_text: Perovskite structures ( ABO₃ ) are a key family of commercially important solids. variants, featuring organic cations like methylammonium ( MA ) in inorganic halide frameworks ( e.g., lead iodide ), emerged as low-cost solar cll materials since 2009, achieving competitive power conversion efficiencies. However, their commercialization is hindered by instability under humid, hot, or illuminated conditions, causing ion migration, phase segregation, and organic-inorganic interface degradation.

label: ai
prompt_text:
Electoral Politics

Why do we need elections? Voters can choose the people who would form government and take major decisions for them.
base_text:
Electoral Politics

Why do we need elections? Voters can choose the people who would form government and take major decisions for them. Elections ensure accountability, as leaders must answer to the public for their actions. They also provide a peaceful mechanism for transferring power, preventing conflicts over governance. By participating, citizens express their preferences and shape policies that reflect their values. Additionally, elections safeguard democratic principles, ensuring that no single group monopolizes authority and that rights are protected through regular, fair competition for leadership.
final_text:
Electoral Politics

Why do we need elections? Voters can choose the people who would form government and take major decisions for them. Elections ensure accountability, as leaders must answer to the public for their actions. They also provide a peaceful mechanism for transferring power, preventing conflicts over governance. By participating, citizens express their preferences and shape policies that reflect their values. Additionally, elections safeguard democratic principles, ensuring that no single group monopolizes authority and that rights are protected through reguular, fair competition for leadership.

label: ai
prompt_text: There have been many advancements in the area of wearable protection systems, such as helmets. Most of the advancements have been focused improvement of the materials for protecting against impact forces. A few designers have attempted to implement some electronics into helmets. However, these attempts fail to provide robust information with regard to detection and/or warning of health risks.
base_text: There have been many advancements in the area of wearable protection systems, such as helmets. Most of the advancements have been focused improvement of the materials for protecting against impact forces. A few designers have attempted to implement some electronics into helmets. However, these attempts fail to provide robust information with regard to detection and/or warning of health risks. Recent innovations, however, are beginning to address these gaps by integrating advanced sensor arrays, real-time biometric monitoring, and machine learning algorithms to detect subtle indicators of concussions, heat stress, or oxygen deprivation.
final_text: There have been many advancements in the area of wearable protection systems, such as helmets. of the advancements have been focused improvement of the materials for protecting against impact forces. A few designers have attempted to implement some electronics into helmets. However, these attempts fail to provide robust information with regard to detection and/or warning of health risks. Recent innovations, however, are beginning to address these gaps by integrating advanced sensor arrays, real-time biometric monitoring, and machine learning algorithms to detect subtle indicators of concussions, heat stress, or oxygen deprivation.

prompt_text: Human Immunodeficiency Virus-associated anaplastic large cell lymphoma. Anaplastic large cell lymphoma (ALCL) is a distinct subtype of peripheral T-cell lymphoma (PTCL) characterized by the expression of CD30 in lymphoma cells. Like aggressive B-cell non-Hodgkin lymphoma, the risk of developing PTCL is also increased in the setting of HIV infection.
